basic_details.job_title: CDPO Batwara Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Child Development Project Office Batwara (CDPO Batwara)
basic_details.short_information: Child Development Project Office Batwara (CDPO Batwara) Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released on 23 June 2026 on the official website of CDPO Batwara. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the CDPO Batwara Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

qualification.details: Anganwadi Worker (Sangini): 10+2 to Graduation Anganwadi Helper (Sahayika): Matriculation or 8th standard

selection_process: Merit based on marks obtained in 10+2 Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CDPO Batwara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CDPO Batwara Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CDPO Batwara Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CDPO Batwara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications for the Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Anganwadi Worker and Helper posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by the Child Development Project Office Batwara. This includes 2 posts for Anganwadi Worker (Sangini) and 1 post for Anganwadi Helper (Sahayika).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the posts is between 18 years to 37 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Anganwadi Worker, candidates need to have completed 10+2 up to Graduation. For Anganwadi Helper, Matriculation or 8th standard is the required qualification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for CDPO Batwara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for CDPO Batwara Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Anganwadi Worker and Helper positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit, determined by the marks obtained in the 10+2 examination. Document verification will also be a part of the selection procedure.

faq.question: Q8. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the Child Development Project Office Batwara, located in Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode is exclusively offline. Candidates must download the application form and send it by post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents, including photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates, as mentioned in the official notification.
